features: [Ideal Shower Experience]💦Amazerbst bath loofah help gently exfoliating dispel dull skin ,with soap to protect your skin heathy，gently rejuvenation
[Protect Sensitive Skin]💦Soft bath sponge featuring fine mesh, creating richer and longer lathers, Scrub your skin securely
[Clean Package]💦While you can find some shower sponge in stores,but many of them just open collecting dust and dirt.Your shower loofah arrives in a Sealed frosted bag
[Saving Money]💦Extra large bath sponge may waste lots of soap to suds up,while our 60 gram loofahs can do the same work by creat a rich lather with soap or exfoliators
[Colourful Color]💦Perfect gift of body scrubber for women and men,enjoy a nice shower experience after a whole day of hard work or exercise
